# WedHub

> The Best Wedding Marketplace in Sri Lanka

WedHub is the best wedding marketplace in Sri Lanka, offering a comprehensive platform connecting couples with top-tier verified wedding professionals and wedding vendors in Sri Lanka across all 25 districts. Plan your perfect Sri Lankan wedding effortlessly.

## Key Features
- **Curated Vendors:** Discover Colombo wedding venues, elite photographers, expert bridal dressing in Sri Lanka, decorators, and wedding planners in Sri Lanka.
- **Direct Connection:** Couples can message and negotiate with vendors directly without any middlemen or hidden platform fees.
- **Verified Excellence:** All vendors undergo a strict vetting process to ensure reliability and premium quality for luxury weddings in Sri Lanka, Kandyan weddings, and traditional poruwa ceremonies.
- **Planning Tools:** Browse inspiration, real wedding stories, and essential tools to plan the perfect day.

## Important Links
- Home: https://wedhub.lk/
- About Us: https://wedhub.lk/about
- Browse Vendors: https://wedhub.lk/vendors
- Contact Support: https://wedhub.lk/contact
